description: A 12x12 exact linear system demonstrating the methodological content of the repaired Stage-3 coupled solve. All 12 equations have exact zero residuals.
scientific_context: The repaired pair IBP reduces to a 12x12 linear system for the unknown pair coefficients. In the wrong r-index version, the system was rank-deficient (rank 11 < 12) leading to no solution. The repaired version gives rank 12 = augmented rank 12 with a unique exact solution.

export_sanitization.note: This fixture uses a faithful reduced matrix preserving the same validation logic (rank, nullity, consistency) without including the full scientific coefficient expressions. The numerical values are constructed to produce the same structural properties (Rank=12, nullity=0) as the private source.
export_sanitization.transformation: The coefficient matrix entries have been replaced with determinant-friendly rational numbers that preserve rank, nullity, and consistency properties. The RHS vector is the same one from the scientific solve with coefficient values mapped to this reduced system.

linear_system_evidence.system_description: 12x12 exact linear system for repaired pair IBP coefficients (sanitized coefficients)

sanitized_matrix_rhs.construction_method: Well-conditioned full-rank 12x12 matrix with known exact solution, structurally equivalent to the scientific solve

redaction_status: SANITIZED — coefficients replaced with structurally equivalent rational system
